name: 10oz 'Come as you are' Kids' Wall Decor with Tassels - Pillowfort™
description: Add inspiring charm to your kid's room by hanging this 'Come As You Are' Wall Decor with Tassels from Pillowfort™. This wall hanging sign features the quote "Come As Your Are" in multicolor fabric letters knitted on a white background. Plus, it features colorful tassels along the bottom for eye-catching flair. Featuring an attached string, you can easily hang it from a hook or nail in the wall.
